question: q03
question_title: 初始部署点、搜索路径与发现概率
statement: Search - Develop a model that will use information from your location model(s) to recommend initial points of deployment and search patterns for the equipment so as to minimize the time to location of a lost submersible. Determine the probability of finding the submersible as a function of time and accumulated search results.
methods: 把位置椭圆转成部署点，按有效扫测面积累计更新发现概率 `1-exp(-swept_area/uncertainty_area)`，形成 24 小时搜索曲线。

parameters.purpose: deterministic rescue-planning example for the official PDF-only problem; not observed incident data
parameters.deployment_area: Ionian Sea tourist wreck-search site near a host ship

search_plan.model: Bayesian-style survival update with deterministic swept-area coverage over the official location-model uncertainty ellipse

search_probability.detection_realism_note: discounts nominal sensor sweep area for deep-water 3D ambiguity, acoustic multipath, terrain shadowing, and contact-confirmation delay

deployment_points.purpose: deploy USBL and first drop beacon
start creeping-line sonar along drift axis
complete LBL bracket and close acoustic geometry

search_pattern: 0-2 h: interrogate acoustic pingers from the host ship and deploy two LBL beacons around P0/P1
2-8 h: run creeping-line side-scan sonar along the drift-axis ellipse from P1 to P2
8-16 h: use ROV to inspect acoustic/sonar contacts and seafloor terrain traps
16-24 h: add AUV expanding-square search around remaining posterior mass if no confirmed contact

location_model.model: current-driven dead-reckoning ellipse with two vertical states: seafloor-resting and neutral-buoyancy drifting

scenario_assumptions.purpose: deterministic rescue-planning example for the official PDF-only problem; not observed incident data
scenario_assumptions.deployment_area: Ionian Sea tourist wreck-search site near a host ship

dominant_uncertainties: unknown vertical state: seafloor versus neutral buoyancy
seafloor terrain trapping and density layers

telemetry_to_reduce_uncertainty.equipment: coded acoustic modem and emergency pinger
telemetry_to_reduce_uncertainty.uncertainty_reduced: horizontal range and bearing from host ship

telemetry_to_reduce_uncertainty.equipment: pressure sensor with logged acoustic burst
telemetry_to_reduce_uncertainty.uncertainty_reduced: distinguishes seafloor contact from neutral-buoyancy drift

telemetry_to_reduce_uncertainty.equipment: IMU, compass, Doppler velocity log where available

telemetry_to_reduce_uncertainty.signal: battery, ballast, and propulsion health flags
telemetry_to_reduce_uncertainty.equipment: fault monitor tied to acoustic status messages
telemetry_to_reduce_uncertainty.uncertainty_reduced: likely mobility, ascent ability, and rescue urgency
